title: 2-D DP (cont.) + RAG architecture + project: RAG chatbot
focus: Edit Distance / Coin Change II + end-to-end RAG + ship a chatbot over your own docs.

items.label: Longest Increasing Path IN A Matrix
Chunking → retrieval → reranking → generation → citations
interviewQuestions: Walk me through chunking trade-offs (size + overlap).
How would you handle citations when the retrieved chunk doesn't actually support the claim?
What's the right refusal behavior when retrieval is weak?

items.label: Why hybrid (dense + sparse) usually wins
interviewQuestions: Why does pure dense retrieval miss product names and error codes?
How would you combine BM25 and dense scores?
When does reciprocal rank fusion beat learned re-ranking?

items.label: Chatbot over a custom knowledge base (LangChain + OpenAI)
Run the same chatbot fully locally with Ollama
Deploy it as a Streamlit / HF Space demo

interviewQuestions: Walk me through chunking trade-offs (size + overlap).
Why does pure dense retrieval miss product names and error codes?
Walk me through the architecture of YOUR RAG chatbot — where would it fail under load?
How would you handle citations when the retrieved chunk doesn't actually support the claim?

references.label: DeepLearning.AI — short courses on GenAI / LLMs
